description: Christian Marclay is a visual/sound artist (not a performing musician). He explicitly does not use social media, confirmed in interviews. Expected gap.
recommendedAction: Keep all social fields as null. This is expected for a gallery-based visual artist.

description: Christina Kubisch is a German sound artist/composer (b. 1948). No social media presence found. Expected for a contemporary classical composer of her generation.
recommendedAction: Keep all social fields as null.

description: Haroon Mirza is a British-Pakistani visual/sound artist represented by Lisson Gallery. No personal social media presence found. Expected for gallery-based artists.
recommendedAction: Keep all social fields as null.

description: Karlheinz Stockhausen passed away in 2007. No social media presence exists; only an official estate-managed website. No public social profiles.
recommendedAction: Keep all social fields as null. Estate-managed only via official website.

description: Robert Henke (Monolake) is a very private artist focused on his work and Ableton Live development. No public social media presence found.
recommendedAction: Keep all social fields as null. Expected for this artist.

description: Samson Young is a Hong Kong sound artist/composer operating primarily in gallery/museum context. No public social media found.
recommendedAction: Keep all social fields as null.

description: Lana Del Rey deactivated her X/Twitter account in 2021. She is currently only active on Instagram (@honeymoon, 24M followers) and Facebook (14.9M followers). No X presence.
recommendedAction: Set xHandle and xFollowers to null. Note: artist intentionally left platform.

description: Gold Panda's X/Twitter account (@goldpanda) exists but explicitly states 'not on twitter' in bio. Only 51 followers. Account is essentially abandoned.
recommendedAction: Record xHandle as @goldpanda but note account is inactive. xFollowers: 51.

description: Nils Frahm deleted his Facebook and Instagram accounts in 2019 citing 'political and moral costs.' He only maintains a minimal X/Twitter presence (@NilsFrahm) with 80 followers.
recommendedAction: Record xHandle as @NilsFrahm with 80 followers. Instagram and Facebook are null (intentionally deleted).

description: Tourist's X/Twitter account (@Tourist) has been suspended. Only Instagram (44K followers) and Facebook (56K followers) remain active.
recommendedAction: Set xHandle and xFollowers to null. Note: account suspended.

description: Tipper (Dave Tipper) has virtually no public social media. Only a Facebook page (tippermusic) exists via his official website, with no visible follower count. No Instagram or X/Twitter found.
recommendedAction: Set Instagram and X to null. Facebook page exists but follower count not accessible.
